name: Gilmer County Parks
description: Come play pickleball at Gilmer County Parks in Ellijay, GA! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the courts. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Most week day mornings there are alot of players, Saturday mornings and Sunday afternoon/evening

name: Talona Ridge RV Resort
description: Talona Ridge RV Resort is a place to play pickleball in Ellijay, GA. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, food, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are not available.
fees: Private — Free for Guests staying at the Resort.

name: Victory Christian Center Pickleball Club
description:
We have 3 basketball full size gyms.  From the end of March until the end of July there are 9 courts.  After July,  3 pickleball courts are taken down for other activities to take place in this event center.
To Join the VCC Pickleball Club (private club) go to www.vccellijay.com and follow the prompts.  It is a donation system and is renewed every quarter.  If you are a visitor or a non-Gilmer County resident and play rarely, we ask for a small donation in the can when entering the "gym" entrance.  A one time waiver also must be signed.
